records.ety: [OE. hart, hert, heort, AS. heort, heorot; akin to D. hert, OHG. hiruz, hirz, G. hirsch, Icel. hjörtr, Dan. & Sw. hjort, L. cervus, and prob. to Gr. kerao`s horned, ke`ras horn. √230. See Horn.]

defs: A stag; the male of the red deer. See the Note under Buck.
quotes: Goodliest of all the forest, hart and hind.
